chapters.title: Chapter I: Drop Site Aftermath
chapters.summary: The loyalist Death Guard survivors of Isstvan regroup under traitor pressure and force a path to extraction.

chapters.title: Chapter II: Warp Transit Crisis
chapters.summary: Warp turbulence and sabotage threaten the warning run while loyalists hold the corridor by attrition.

chapters.title: Chapter III: Blockade Breach
chapters.summary: A traitor interdiction ring closes near Luna; the strike element clears the relay approach by force.

chapters.title: Chapter IV: Terra Relay
chapters.summary: Final transmission window: secure the relay and broadcast the warning before collapse.
